GREEN.signage_message: Trains running on time. Have a safe journey.

YELLOW.action: Alert Station Master. Pre-position RPF personnel.
YELLOW.signage_message: Platform crowded. Please move towards the ends.

RED.action: Require HITL Verification. Prepare automated rerouting.
RED.signage_message: WARNING: High density. Do not board approaching train.

CRITICAL.signage_message: STOP. PLATFORM CLOSED. USE ALTERNATE EXITS.
